testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:54593/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.97, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: testcase.name: verify_account_registration
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: null at testCases.TC001_AccountRegistrationTest.verify_account_registration(TC001_AccountRegistrationTest.java:51) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ...
